title: TrollGUI
description: Wanna troll members? Friends? A pesky cheater? This Plugin is prefect for just that.
body: RandomTrollGUI – Wanna troll your friends, members, or even cheaters? Open a simple GUI and prank them with Classic tricks (launch, blind, teleport, explosions), Movement chaos (spin, bounce, reverse controls), and the ultimate Extreme prank: trap them in a temporary bedrock box!
